name: rainpath-workflow-test
description: Monorepo React + NestJS avec Prisma et SQLite

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n prisma,backend,frontend -c magenta,blue,green "npm run prisma:watch -w backend" "npm run start:dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend -- --fix
